title: UISwitch Value Change Listener : Swift
summary: Adding an value change event to a UISwitch is something that is required most of the time. For views like UISwitch , we can connect an IBAction with the event type as value changed and get a callback for the value changed.
content: Adding an value change event to a UISwitch is something that is required most of the time. For views like UISwitch, we can connect an IBAction with the event type as value changed and get a callback for the value changed.
